queries.question: List tennis tournaments and golf tournaments where Nike is the sponsor.
queries.sql:
SELECT Tennis_Tournaments.tournamentname
FROM Sponsors JOIN Tennis_Tournaments ON Sponsors.id = Tennis_Tournaments.sponsorID
WHERE Sponsors.name = 'Nike'
UNION
SELECT Golf_Tournaments.tournamentname
FROM Sponsors JOIN Golf_Tournaments ON Sponsors.id = Golf_Tournaments.sponsorID
WHERE Sponsors.name = 'Nike'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?sponsors a :Sponsors .
    ?tennis_tournaments a :Tennis_Tournaments .
    ?tennis_tournaments p:hasSponsors ?sponsors .
    ?tennis_tournaments p:tournamentName ?tournamentname .
    ?sponsors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Nike")
    BIND(?tournamentname AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?sponsors a :Sponsors .
    ?golf_tournaments a :Golf_Tournaments .
    ?golf_tournaments p:hasSponsors ?sponsors .
    ?golf_tournaments p:tournamentName ?tournamentname .
    ?sponsors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Nike")
    BIND(?tournamentname AS ?o0)
  }
}
